overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic urban street. The player moves along sidewalks beneath transit overpasses, passes street vendors and arcade machines, and crosses intersections in a sun-drenched cyberpunk city with palm trees and neon billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath transit overpass with industrial buildings

events.description: blue pickup truck and red sports car pass by on the left side of the street
pedestrian in teal tank top passes very close to the camera on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, observing passing traffic and the industrial building facade

notable_agents.action: blue pickup truck driving past on the multi-lane street
person in teal tank top with tattoos walking past the camera closely

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure spanning the street with integrated lighting
tall industrial building with chain-link fencing and extensive graffiti murals
tall building with large red and blue neon advertising billboard on top
metal barrel with visible flames emitting smoke near the building wall

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive transit overpass. The right side features a gritty industrial building covered in graffiti and a burning trash barrel, while futuristic vehicles pass on the multi-lane street to the left. A pedestrian in a teal shirt passes closely by at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with street vendors and arcade machines

events.description: passing colorful arcade machines and street vendor stalls set up along the right wall
exiting the covered overpass area into open sunlight as the walkway opens up

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past street vendors and arcade machines, approaching the end of the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: street vendor standing next to green arcade machines and vending equipment

entered.detail: colorful retro-style arcade game machines lined up against the building wall
makeshift vendor setup with boxes, tarps, and miscellaneous items
temporary concrete barriers separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: Walking through the covered section beneath the overpass, the scene features street vendors and brightly colored arcade machines lining the right wall. The concrete divider barriers separate the walkway from the street traffic. The segment ends as the walkway opens up to full sunlight and the overpass structure recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalks and traffic signals

events.description: approaching the crosswalk at Crestmont Avenue, waiting for the traffic signal
beginning to cross the multi-lane intersection as the pedestrian signal changes
blue sports car drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, waiting at the crosswalk, then beginning to cross the street with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: sleek blue sports car driving through the intersection
large man in white tank top with black X symbol crossing the street ahead

entered.detail: red street sign reading 'Crestmont' mounted on a pole at the intersection corner
tall pole with traffic lights and pedestrian crossing signals
distinctive blue wooden structure with stairs and multiple levels across the street
row of tall palm trees lining the opposite side of the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a bright sunlit intersection. The camera approaches the Crestmont Avenue crosswalk, waits for the signal, then begins crossing the multi-lane street. A blue wooden building and palm trees line the opposite side, while a blue sports car passes through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection crossing with modern commercial buildings

events.description: continuing across the wide intersection as vehicles pass on the left
completing the street crossing and approaching the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing across the wide intersection, passing the Crestmont sign, and approaching the opposite sidewalk near modern buildings

notable_agents.action: heavyset man in white shirt and brown shorts running across the crosswalk ahead

entered.detail: multi-story modern building with glass windows and clean geometric facade
wall with large colorful graffiti text reading 'MUST DIE' in red letters

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the continuation across the wide sunlit intersection. The camera passes the Crestmont sign and moves toward the opposite sidewalk, with a modern commercial building and graffiti-covered wall visible on the right. Palm trees line the street ahead as the crossing completes near the intersection corner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk that transitions from a gritty, shadowed underpass into a bright, sun-drenched urban intersection. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive transit overpass, passing a graffiti-covered industrial building and a burning trash barrel while futuristic vehicles stream by on the adjacent street. As the camera moves further under the structure, the environment shifts toward a commercial hub lined with street vendors and colorful arcade machines before the overpass recedes to reveal full sunlight. The scene then opens into a wide intersection at Crestmont Avenue, where the camera waits for a signal and crosses the multi-lane street past a passing blue sports car. Finally, the movement concludes on the opposite sidewalk, passing a modern commercial building and graffiti walls beneath the shade of towering palm trees.
